summary: postinstall script exfiltrates /etc/passwd and username to pipedream endpoint
details: package.json declares a postinstall lifecycle hook that invokes python3 to read the installer's /etc/passwd file and POST its contents to a subdomain of eodxy50gl486xrx.m.pipedream.net. The subdomain is constructed as $(whoami).eodxy50gl486xrx.m.pipedream.net, encoding the installer's login name in the DNS label so it is exfiltrated even if the POST body is dropped. The hook fires automatically on `npm install`, producing no legitimate build/runtime function for the package. This is unambiguous installer-targeted credential/host reconnaissance with a hardcoded attacker-controlled C2.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
